moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins this week at Royal Birkdale, with golf's biggest stars competing for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: It's golf's biggest major! The Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Angle
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is hosting The Open this week! Get ready for four days of world-class golf right on our doorstep.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France is well underway, with riders tackling challenging mountain stages as the race progresses towards Paris.

angles.name: General Update
angles.copy: The Tour de France peloton is deep into the mountains today! Who's holding the yellow jersey as we head towards the final week?

angles.name: Race for the Jersey
angles.copy: Every pedal stroke counts! The Tour de France is heating up with the General Classification battle in full swing. Tune in for the latest.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Klarna presents Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Suffolk Local
angles.copy: Latitude is almost here! Henham Park is gearing up for a massive weekend of music, comedy, and more. Are you heading to Suffolk?

moments.title: Rock Oyster Festival This Week
moments.blurb: The Rock Oyster Festival brings music, food, and culture to Cornwall from July 23-26, featuring headliners like Scissor Sisters and Kool & the Gang.

angles.name: Westcountry Festival
angles.copy: Rock Oyster Festival is just around the corner in Cornwall! Get ready for a delicious blend of music and food, with Scissor Sisters and Kool & the Gang headlining.

angles.name: Food & Music
angles.copy: Who's heading to Rock Oyster in Cornwall next week? World-class chefs and incredible music from Groove Armada, Scissor Sisters, and Kool & the Gang await!

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In', while Olivia Rodrigo's 'Stupid Song' climbs to number 2.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart! Who else is loving 'Rein Me In'?

angles.name: New Entries & Climbers
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo is up to Number 2 with 'Stupid Song' in the latest UK Singles Chart! What's your favourite track in the Top 10 this week?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Season 13 of Love Island UK is heating up on ITV2 and ITVX, with daily drama from the villa keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! What are your predictions for tonight's episode?

angles.name: Villa Talk
angles.copy: Who's coupled up and who's on the rocks? The latest from Love Island UK is essential viewing tonight!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May turns 79 on July 19, a true rock icon and astrophysicist.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: He's a rock legend and an astrophysicist! Happy Birthday to Queen's incredible guitarist, Brian May!

moments.title: Happy Birthday J.Lo
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24, continuing to dominate music, film, and fashion.

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez! What's your favourite J.Lo hit to get you on the dancefloor?

angles.name: Iconic Performer
angles.copy: From the block to global superstar, Happy Birthday to Jennifer Lopez on July 24! Drop your favourite J.Lo track below!

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 on July 22.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get down with the funk! Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary George Clinton, the mastermind behind Parliament-Funkadelic!

angles.name: Music Pioneer
angles.copy: The Godfather of Funk, George Clinton, celebrates his birthday on July 22! What's your favourite P-Funk track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist Slash turns 61 on July 23, known for his distinctive top hat and electrifying solos.

angles.name: Rock God
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the guitar hero, Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses anthem featuring his iconic riffs?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: That top hat and those solos! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the legendary Slash on July 23!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Michelle Williams
moments.blurb: Destiny's Child member Michelle Williams celebrates her 46th birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Star
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to Michelle Williams, a vocal powerhouse from Destiny's Child! What's your favourite DC track?

angles.name: Solo & Group Success
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Williams' birthday on July 23! From Destiny's Child hits to her solo career, she's a true talent.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across genres, turns 80 on July 15.

angles.name: Vocal Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt! What's your favourite song from her incredible career?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on July 15! Her voice has graced so many classic hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha and the Vandellas, turns 85 on July 18.

angles.name: Motown Icon
angles.copy: Dancing in the Street! Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves of Martha and the Vandellas!

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Motown legend Martha Reeves on July 18! Her voice defined an era.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Spencer Davis
moments.blurb: Welsh rock and roll pioneer Spencer Davis, founder of The Spencer Davis Group, would have been 87 on July 17.

angles.name: Welsh Music Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible Spencer Davis, born in Swansea, who would have turned 87 on July 17. Keep his music alive!

angles.name: 60s Icon
angles.copy: Gimme Some Lovin'! Celebrating the birthday of Welsh rock legend Spencer Davis on July 17. What's your favourite track from The Spencer Davis Group?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ben Barlow
moments.blurb: Ben Barlow, lead vocalist of Welsh pop-punk band Neck Deep, turns 32 on July 22.

angles.name: Welsh Pop-Punk
angles.copy: Happy 32nd Birthday to Ben Barlow, frontman of Wrexham's own Neck Deep! What's your go-to Neck Deep anthem?

angles.name: Neck Deep Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Ben Barlow on July 22! Keep rocking, Ben!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Fred again..
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning British DJ and producer Fred again.. turns 33 on July 19, celebrated for his innovative electronic music.

angles.name: Dance Music Star
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Fred again..! What's your favourite track from the electronic music wizard?

angles.name: Producer Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Fred again.. on July 19! His innovative sound is taking over dancefloors worldwide.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School's out for summer! Families across the UK are preparing for the start of the summer holidays towards the end of July.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The summer school holidays are almost here! What are your plans for the long break? Let us know!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Counting down to the summer school holidays! Get ready for weeks of family fun and adventures across the UK.
